name: Worktree
description: Library component. Models a polecat worktree on disk. Two states (Present, Cleaned), one in-port. Cleaned by an external Landing actor during convoy-land per cmd/convoy.go:1243-1255. Worktree doesn't observe anything; the Landing ceremony in the application drives it via the CLEAN channel. Trivial by design -- the worktree's interesting behavior (creation, branch fetching, deletion timing) lives in the surrounding ceremony, not in the worktree itself.

CLEAN.description: receives a clean signal from the Landing actor when the convoy lands. Tagged 'Clean'.

actors.name: Worktree
actors.owner: On-disk worktree directory. Present after polecat spawn (initial state, since this component does not yet model the spawn step). Cleaned after Landing's CLEAN signal -- corresponds to removePolecatWorktree in cmd/convoy.go:1243-1255.

triples.event: Landing fires CLEAN: worktree directory removed
